title: Terminated by explosive use of memory.
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.57+218 (git sha1 30cb72a16, g++ 13.3.0-6ubuntu2~24.04 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

[synth_ethmac_asap7_base_2025-10-01_11-36.tar.gz](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22630189/synth_ethmac_asap7_base_2025-10-01_11-36.tar.gz)

./run


### Expected Behavior

No explosive use of memory.
The run should finish successfully.


### Actual Behavior

### Log

...
20.55. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).

20.56. Mapping module 'ALU_16_0_3_0_17_unused_CO_X_KOGGE_STONE'.

20.56.1. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).

20.56.2. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).

**<<<<< Terminated by signal 9 (SIGKILL) due to explosive use of memory. >>>>>**

- The test case reaches the problematic point in ~20 mins.



### Results in different versions

Yosys 0.57+218 (git sha1 30cb72a16, g++ 13.3.0-6ubuntu2~24.04 -fPIC -O3)
- **Explosive mem usage (this issue)**

Yosys 0.57+212 (git sha1 29e0144eb, g++ 13.3.0-6ubuntu2~24.04 -fPIC -O3)
- https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/issues/5377

Yosys 0.57 (git sha1 3aca86049, g++ 13.3.0-6ubuntu2~24.04 -fPIC -O3)
Yosys 0.55 (git sha1 60f126cd0, g++ 13.3.0-6ubuntu2~24.04 -fPIC -O3)
- https://github.com/The-OpenROAD-Project/OpenROAD-flow-scripts/issues/3503


I couldn't find Yosys version that can finish successfully with this test case.
